title: 有馬記念の後に・キーワードを集めよ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's fishing banner flies high as proof of
her victory over Eishin Flash in the Arima Kinen.
As promised, a new clue from the Book of Secrets
is hers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It says Eden is at the bottom of the ocean and
can only be reached after defeating four powerful
opponents and collecting four clues. The whole
thing is extremely fishy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Who wrote the Book of Secrets? And where did it
come from? No answers are available, but the
only path left is forward. Eden awaits you, Gold
Ship! Most likely, anyway!
